chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-7671 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.32531/2022. 2. For orders on Misc. No.32532/2022. 3. For orders on Misc. No.32533/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 16.12.2022. Mr. Khaqan Baber Mughal, Advocate for the Petitioner. -------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking to assail an Order dated 07.09.2022 passed by the Deputy Commissioner, Keamari, Karachi on the subject of cancellation of her Domicile and PRC. However, on query posed to learned counsel for the Petitioner as to whether the remedy available under the Sind Permanent Residence Certificate Rules 1971 had been availed, learned counsel for the Petitioner was at loss to offer any satisfactory response and subsequently conceded that such remedy had not been exhausted. Under the given circumstances, we are of the view that the Petition is misconceived. Hence, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE MUBASHIR
